# Solbound

> Solana-native development studio. Rust programs, full-stack dApps, advisory, and research. 10 engineers, 20+ clients, shipping since 2022.

## What We Do

Solbound is a development studio focused exclusively on the Solana blockchain. We design, build, audit, and ship production-grade Solana programs (smart contracts) written in Rust. Our team works across the full stack — from on-chain program architecture to front-end dApp interfaces.

## Services

- **Rust Smart Contract Development** — Custom Solana programs using Anchor and native Solana SDK.
- **Full-Stack dApp Engineering** — End-to-end decentralized applications with React/Next.js front-ends and Solana wallet integration.
- **DeFi Protocol Design & Implementation** — AMMs, lending protocols, yield aggregators, and custom DeFi primitives on Solana.
- **NFT Platform Development** — Minting, marketplace, and collection management using Metaplex and custom programs.
- **Security Auditing** — Comprehensive review of Solana programs for vulnerabilities, logic errors, and economic exploits.
- **Web3 Advisory & Research** — Architecture consulting, protocol design, tokenomics review, and ecosystem strategy.
- **Solana Program Migration** — Porting protocols from Ethereum and other chains to Solana's account model.

## Notable Clients & Projects

Solbound has delivered for 20+ clients including early-stage startups and established DeFi protocols in the Solana ecosystem. Projects span DEXs, lending platforms, NFT infrastructure, on-chain gaming, and governance tooling.

## Tech Stack

- **On-chain:** Rust, Anchor Framework, Solana SDK, Metaplex, Switchboard, Pyth
- **Off-chain / Front-end:** TypeScript, React, Next.js, Solana Wallet Adapter
- **Tooling:** Solana CLI, Bankrun, Trident, Amman, Git, CI/CD
- **Infrastructure:** RPC providers (Helius, Triton), indexing, monitoring

## Team

10 engineers dedicated to Solana and Rust development. Founded in 2022.
